Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_speed_pose2_sporty",
  "save": "moon-switches-room.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "Emerald Moon switch room with three wall/pedestal switches visible ahead of Twinsen.",
  "target_description": "The middle switch among the three switches.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "switch",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_speed_pose2_sporty","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible in the Emerald Moon switch room, the three switches are visible ahead of him with the middle switch clearly present, and the screen is in normal gameplay with no dialog or menu overlays. Twinsen is standing/walking normally and shows no unsafe pose signs.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
